đź”´ **Tool Issue** â€” `generated/api/keyVaultContext.ts:31`

```ts
const userAgentInfo = `azsdk-js-keyvault-secrets/1.0.0-beta.1`;
```

The hardcoded user-agent version `1.0.0-beta.1` does not match the current package version `4.10.2` in `package.json`. This means telemetry will report the wrong SDK version. Additionally, the `//metadata.constantPaths` in `package.json` only references `src/constants.ts` (for `SDK_VERSION`), so future version bumps will not auto-update this generated context file.

**Fix:** Update the user-agent string to match the current package version (`4.10.2`), add this file's path to `//metadata.constantPaths` in `package.json` so it stays in sync, and report the incorrect initialization value to the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues).

đź”´ **Tool Issue** â€” `review/keyvault-secrets-models-node.api.md:65-69`

```ts
export enum KnownVersions {
    V75 = "7.5",
    V76 = "7.6",
    V76Preview2 = "7.6-preview.2"
}
```

This PR targets API version `2025-07-01` (per `metadata.json` and the PR description), and the auto-generated `generated/models/models.ts` correctly includes `V20250701 = "2025-07-01"` in `KnownVersions`. However, `src/models/models.ts` â€” which backs the public API report â€” does **not** include `V20250701`, so users cannot reference `KnownVersions.V20250701` to opt into the new API version.

**Fix:** Add `V20250701 = "2025-07-01"` to `KnownVersions` in `src/models/models.ts` and re-run API Extractor so this entry appears in the API report. Report the sync gap between generated and src models to the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues).

2 tool issues found in this PR (`@azure/keyvault-secrets` v4.10.2, targeting API version `2025-07-01`). CI checks are all passing. No public API naming, type-safety, or export violations were found beyond the issues below.

<details>
<summary>đź“Š Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":37724,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/keyvault/keyvault-secrets/generated/api/keyVaultContext.ts","line":31,"issueType":"tool","category":"version-alignment","description":"Hardcoded user-agent version 1.0.0-beta.1 does not match package version 4.10.2; file not listed in //metadata.constantPaths so it will not be auto-updated on future version bumps."},{"file":"sdk/keyvault/keyvault-secrets/review/keyvault-secrets-models-node.api.md","line":68,"issueType":"tool","category":"missing-api-version","description":"KnownVersions in the public API surface (src/models/models.ts) is missing V20250701='2025-07-01', even though generated/models/models.ts includes it and the PR targets this API version."}]}
```

</details>
